text.message: Ohh this guy again

how am I delusional? who won last game?

But it didn't matter since red had 2 knights in hand
So me blocking him would not change the outcome at any point
children, please, calm down
play nice
You were at 9, I was at 9, red was at 9
After that the bot blocked you
It is just funny that you want to blame it on me for blocking you while you were leading
When you didn't block red before that
I am on 9 points with no easy option to go to 10
red is on 8 points with 3 devs and 6+ cards
and you double solo block me
you gave him the game, just face it
I easily could have not gotten to 10 in 3 turns
while it was obvious he needs 1-2
He wouldnt have won if og blocked him, he was next to play after me and he would remove the robber whereever i place it
So I would have taken 1 resource from him
He had 15 when he won
It didn't matter at all
yes, because he drew resources from not being blocked by you
He was after me
He can knight before rolling

thought i saw someone clicking yes
wheat nb

just chill

nb
